name: Snapper Cakes with Spicy Pepper Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch snapper with bay leaf about 30 seconds in boiling water.
2. Combine Creole seasoning, basil, cilantro, salt and bread crumbs in a mixing bowl.
3. Add mustard, lime juice, garlic, bell pepper, egg, yolk and green onion; mix well.
4. Form the mixture into 16 (2-ounce) cakes.
5. Sauté cakes in butter until golden brown.
6. Serve with Spicy Roasted Pepper Sauce.
